reference: Hi Doctor, I am having yellow, smelly, and sparkly urine. After that, I suffered kidney pain two months ago. I did an ultrasound, and the results indicated that I have twenty-nine mm of sediment inside a bag in the middle of my right kidney, and I urinated some blood during those pains.
text: Hi, doctor. I am having yellow, smelly, and sparkly urine. After that, I suffered kidney pain two months ago. I did an ultrasound, and the results indicated that I have 29 millimeters of sediment inside a bag in the middle of my right kidney, and I urinated some blood during those pains.
